page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz. The instance provides 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 8 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, ensuring no hyperthreading resource sharing. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is configured with a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with the instance. The absence of local storage and GPU accelerators represents a clear tradeoff, positioning this instance away from heavy storage-bound or parallel-processing workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and balanced memory-to-CPU ratio offer predictable performance for standard enterprise applications. The resource density is optimized for general-purpose workloads that require consistent CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading. Suitable workloads include mid-range web servers, application servers, containerized microservices, and development environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it delivers 8 dedicated vCPUs across 8 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading resource contention. The instance features 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, relying entirely on external storage solutions, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. With no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this instance is designed for predictable, non-burstable workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for standard enterprise tasks, making it highly suitable for web serving, application hosting, containerized deployments, and general-purpose business applications requiring dedicated compute resources.
